title: Practice Cockpit — RALIA dashboard composition
summary: RALIA's practice-level dashboard: a card grid of risk gauges, chart containers, client-scope banner and wizard-driven flows. The layout, thresholds and copy are RALIA product decisions; every building block is a consumable Layer 1/2 primitive.
buildInstead: Compose Card + Gauge + ChartContainer from the package; the cockpit's grid and band thresholds are not part of the design system contract.
